hero.description: Turning creative ideas into interactive and high-quality web experiences.

chat.greeting: Hey! 👋 Welcome to Prince's personal page. I specialize in modern interfaces and web development. Pick a question below or just explore the site!

answers.a0: Hey there! I'm Prince — a frontend developer specialized in building modern web interfaces. I love working with React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Currently studying at PDP University and always learning something new. 🚀
answers.a1: Programming gives me the power to turn ideas into reality. Creating a site with a beautiful design and smooth animations feels like crafting a piece of art to me. Every pixel matters! ✨
answers.a2: My core stack: React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS. I also work with Node.js, Firebase, Three.js, and Framer Motion. Always excited to try new tools! 💻
answers.a3: Absolutely! I'm always open to freelance projects and collaborations. Currently working on my portfolio, WebKaizen, and more. Head over to the Contact section to reach out! 🤝

git.description: Distributed version control system tracking changes in code.

github.description: A hub for developers to store code, collaborate, and share open source projects.

terminal.description: The fastest way to communicate with systems and projects via command line.

contact.sendDescription: Your message opens directly in WhatsApp—no spam, just real connection.

aboutPage.heading: About Myself
aboutPage.p1: I'm currently a Class 12 student with PCMB, but honestly, my main interest is not in Biology anymore. Before 9th class, I used to think that I would go into the medical field in the future, but as time passed, I started getting more interested in computers and technology.
aboutPage.p2: In 11th class, I explored coding more seriously and slowly developed a strong interest in programming, cybersecurity, and AI.
aboutPage.p3: Now, coding is something I genuinely enjoy. I like learning new programming languages, building things, and understanding how technology works behind the scenes.
aboutPage.p4: Out of everything in tech, ethical hacking and cybersecurity interest me the most because I find it exciting to learn about system security, vulnerabilities, and how hackers think.
aboutPage.p5: At the same time, I also enjoy using AI tools and understanding how AI can make work smarter and easier.
aboutPage.p6: After completing Class 12, I want to move completely into the coding and tech field. My goal is to build a future in cybersecurity, ethical hacking, and AI.
aboutPage.p7: I know there's still a lot to learn, but I enjoy the process and always try to improve my skills step by step.
aboutPage.p8: For me, technology is not just a career option anymore — it's something I truly connect with and see myself doing in the future.
